message:
Extend PE type inference for axis-aware reductions, Dot, and shape ops

infer_equation_output_aval() now parses params to compute correct output
shapes for axis-aware reductions (axes param), Dot (always scalar),
Reshape (new_shape), Slice (start/limit indices), Transpose (permutation),
and BroadcastInDim (target shape). Adds 8 tests covering each case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
